prd.title: VibePilot - Simple Test PRD
prd.overview: Add a simple test feature to verify the endless session spawning bug is fixed
objectives: Create a simple test task to verify the system is working correctly
Verify only one session per task is spawned
Verify no duplicate tasks are created
success_criteria: No duplicate tasks created in database
Only one kilo session spawned per task

features.name: T001: Simple Test Task
features.description: Create a simple test file that outputs 'TEST PASSED'
features.prompt_packet: Create a file called test_passed.txt in the repository root with the content 'TEST PASSED - Session spawning bug is fixed!'
